allow: Bash(bash -c 'branch=$\(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null\); if [ "$branch" = "main" ]; then echo "On main branch — create a feature/fix/hw branch first \(see WORKFLOW.md\)"; exit 2; fi')
Bash(bash -c 'jq -r '"'"'.tool_input.file_path // ""'"'"' | grep -q "config\\.h" && echo "NOTE: Editing config.h \(hardware tunables\) — rebuild+flash required for changes to take effect"; exit 0')
